## Adding a new image?

If you're adding a project to the scan list, please confirm:

- [ ] The image is publicly pullable (Docker Hub or GHCR)
- [ ] The project is a self-hosted / homelab tool
- [ ] Only one entry was added per project
- [ ] The entry was added at the end of `images.yaml`

**Project URL:** <!-- link to the project's GitHub repo -->
